name: @dbbasic/browser
description: The dbbasic-browser Electron shell — owns the network stack via protocol.handle to pay x402 challenges transparently.
author: AskRobots

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:electron --external:viem --outfile=dist/main.js && cp src/chrome.html src/preload.cjs dist/
